'''chofafaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:iatrochemic|iatrochemic]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-f-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:iatrochemic|iatrochemic]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| chofafaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:chofafithi|chofafithi]] || [[word:chofafiji|chofafiji]] || [[word:chofafishi|chofafishi]] || [[word:chofafiki|chofafiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:chofafuthuthu|chofafuthuthu]] || [[word:chofafujuju|chofafujuju]] || [[word:chofafushushu|chofafushushu]] || [[word:chofafukuku|chofafukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:chofafuthu|chofafuthu]] || [[word:chofafuju|chofafuju]] || [[word:chofafushu|chofafushu]] || [[word:chofafuku|chofafuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:chofafufthuf|chofafufthuf]] || [[word:chofafufjuf|chofafufjuf]] || [[word:chofafufshuf|chofafufshuf]] || [[word:chofafufkuf|chofafufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:chofafethe|chofafethe]] || [[word:chofafeje|chofafeje]] || [[word:chofafeshe|chofafeshe]] || [[word:chofafeke|chofafeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:chofafothotho|chofafothotho]] || [[word:chofafojojo|chofafojojo]] || [[word:chofafoshosho|chofafoshosho]] || [[word:chofafokoko|chofafokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:chofafotho|chofafotho]] || [[word:chofafojo|chofafojo]] || [[word:chofafosho|chofafosho]] || [[word:chofafoko|chofafoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:chofafofthof|chofafofthof]] || [[word:chofafofjof|chofafofjof]] || [[word:chofafofshof|chofafofshof]] || [[word:chofafofkof|chofafofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:chofafïfthïf|chofafïfthïf]] || [[word:chofafïfjïf|chofafïfjïf]] || [[word:chofafïfshïf|chofafïfshïf]] || [[word:chofafïfkïf|chofafïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:chofafïfthïfthïf|chofafïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:chofafïfjïfjïf|chofafïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:chofafïfshïfshïf|chofafïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:chofafïfkïfkïf|chofafïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:chofafïfthïf|chofafïfthïf]] || [[word:chofafïfjïf|chofafïfjïf]] || [[word:chofafïfshïf|chofafïfshïf]] || [[word:chofafïfkïf|chofafïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:chofafïfthïf|chofafïfthïf]] || [[word:chofafïfjïf|chofafïfjïf]] || [[word:chofafïfshïf|chofafïfshïf]] || [[word:chofafïfkïf|chofafïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:chofafæthæ|chofafæthæ]] || [[word:chofafæjæ|chofafæjæ]] || [[word:chofafæshæ|chofafæshæ]] || [[word:chofafækæ|chofafækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:chofafathatha|chofafathatha]] || [[word:chofafajaja|chofafajaja]] || [[word:chofafashasha|chofafashasha]] || [[word:chofafakaka|chofafakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:chofafatha|chofafatha]] || [[word:chofafaja|chofafaja]] || [[word:chofafasha|chofafasha]] || [[word:chofafaka|chofafaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:chofafafthaf|chofafafthaf]] || [[word:chofafafjaf|chofafafjaf]] || [[word:chofafafshaf|chofafafshaf]] || [[word:chofafafkaf|chofafafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:chofafasha|chofafasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:chofafshësha|chofafshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:chofafrosha|chofafrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:chofafmusha|chofafmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:chofafyasha|chofafyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochofafnkshësha|gochofafnkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochofafnkrosha|gochofafnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochofafnkmusha|gochofafnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gochofafnkyasha|gochofafnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:chofafafasha|chofafafasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:chofafafshësha|chofafafshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:chofafafrosha|chofafafrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:chofafafmusha|chofafafmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:chofafafyasha|chofafafyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochofafafnkshësha|gochofafafnkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochofafafnkrosha|gochofafafnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochofafafnkmusha|gochofafafnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gochofafafnkyasha|gochofafafnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:chefæfasha|chefæfasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:chefæfshësha|chefæfshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:chefæfrosha|chefæfrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:chefæfmusha|chefæfmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:chefæfyasha|chefæfyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochefæfnkshësha|gochefæfnkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochefæfnkrosha|gochefæfnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochefæfnkmusha|gochefæfnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gochefæfnkyasha|gochefæfnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:chofafasha|chofafasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:chofafshësha|chofafshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:chofafrosha|chofafrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:chofafmusha|chofafmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:chofafyasha|chofafyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochofafnkshësha|gochofafnkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochofafnkrosha|gochofafnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochofafnkmusha|gochofafnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gochofafnkyasha|gochofafnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|66806d6}}
